indicators.name: Couch
indicators.rationale: The couch provides a comfortable seating option for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: Floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden flooring is easy to walk on and clean, which is convenient for a workspace.

indicators.name: Table-merged
indicators.rationale: The table can be used to place a laptop or other work materials.

indicators.name: Cabinet-merged
indicators.rationale: The cabinet might be used for storage but does not directly support computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is moderately suitable for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a comfortable seating option and a functional table, but lacks dedicated storage for work materials.
